Tests that the tangent of negative infinity is NaN using Math.tan.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.tan` function in JavaScript when applied to negative infinity. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.tan(-Infinity)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.tan` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior when handling special numeric values like negative infinity. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `Math.tan` function.
